productDisplayName: Nike Unisex All Access HA Pink Backpack
description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag you can find than this one from nike. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space, this bag also makes for a great everyday wear to school or college.Height: 18" Width: 12.5" Depth: 8” Capacity: 30 litres Made of polyester with a nylon and polyester lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a zippered pouch to store essentials One front zippered compartment at the bottom with two mesh organizers for easy use Appliqued Athletic Department badges on the front and side panels, with a nike swoosh badge on the small front pocket Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable padded handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Care Hand washClean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not dry clean or machine washDo not bleach Do not tumble dryDo not wringLine dry Do not iron
